description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release Rust Packages that runs on push with tags, on pull requests to the master branch affecting the workflow file itself, and on workflow dispatch. In an ubuntu-latest job, check out the repository, perform a dry run of publishing a Rust package in the lib/rs directory, and then publish the package if the workflow was triggered by a tag event and the tag does not contain a hyphen, using a CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN from secrets.
